sections.heading: How to compare Dairy Free options before ordering

faq_items.question: Where can I buy dairy free chocolate online in Australia?

faq_items.question: How should I compare dairy free chocolate prices?

faq_items.question: Are there other dairy free options worth comparing?
faq_items.answer: Yes. Nearby collections or substitute products can be useful when dairy free chocolate is out of stock or only available in limited pack sizes.
